description: A native drag-and-drop shelf for Wayland and Windows (portable Windows build).
notes: Launch Yeet, then press Ctrl+Alt+Y (configurable) or left-click the notification-area icon to summon the shelf.
With an empty shelf Yeet stays in the background (tray icon + screen-edge strip); it does not open a window until summoned.
Settings live in %APPDATA%\hjosugi\Yeet and are kept across updates and uninstalls.
Release builds are currently unsigned, so SmartScreen may warn on first launch. See https://github.com/hjosugi/yeet/blob/main/docs/windows.md
